Deflection Armor.name: Deflection Armor
Deflection Armor.description: Deflection armor offers a trade-off for a somewhat maneuverable but less bulky ship. A ship with Deflection Armor installed gains damage reduction (3), but limits the amount of Dexterity that can be applied to its Armor Class

Quick-Charge Shield.name: Quick-Charge Shield
Quick-Charge Shield.description: Quick-Charge Shields, opposite of Fortress Shields, offer a reduced capacity but rapidly replenish.

Lightweight Armor.name: Lightweight Armor
Lightweight Armor.description: Lightweight armor is commonly used on smaller ships, allowing them to take full advantage of their quickness.

Reinforced Armor.name: Reinforced Armor
Reinforced Armor.description: Reinforced armor grants a ship significant damage reduction, but makes it less likely to avoid damage.

Fortress Shield.name: Fortress Shield
Fortress Shield.description: Fortress shields offer a higher maximum shield points, but regenerate slower than normal shields.

Directional Shield.name: Directional Shield
Directional Shield.description: Directional Shields are the most commonly used and balanced shields on the market.
